content.text:
Perfect! I found the bug. The issue is on line 1797:

```java
if (dataset != null) {
    return result;  // BUG: this should return when dataset == null!
}
```

The condition is inverted. When the dataset is NOT null, it returns an empty result immediately instead of processing the dataset. It should return when the dataset IS null. So the fix is simple:

todos.content: Set up the environment timezone to America/Los_Angeles

Apply the fix to the buggy file
Run the triggering test again to verify the fix
Output the patch in diff format to blind_fix.patch
